message:
feat(numpy): implement comparison operations returning boolean arrays

- Add BoolArray type for boolean comparison results in runtime/numpy_array.zig
- Add bool_array type_id to PyObject.TypeId
- Add compareScalar/compareArrays functions for element-wise comparisons
- Update numpy.sum to handle boolean arrays (counts true values)
- Add codegen for numpy array comparisons (arr > scalar, arr == scalar, etc.)
- Add type inference for bool_array type and comparison expressions
- Fix unit tests for updated scalar-returning functions (sum, mean, dot)

Comparison operators: >, >=, <, <=, ==, !=
